g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain subsystem v1 Decomposition in detail — how does TF-IDF + SBERT convert raw text into simple propositions/frames?')
sendPrompt('Explain subsystem v2 Identification — how does multi-label classification assign event types?')
sendPrompt('Explain subsystem v3 Precedent matching — how does CBR with correspondence matrix work for incident matching?')
sendPrompt('Design the 4 specialist agents for v4 — what domains does each cover and how do they generate structured claims?')
sendPrompt('Detail subsystem v5 — how does Dung\\'s argumentation framework replace propositional logic verification?')
sendPrompt('Detail subsystem v6 — how do grounded/preferred extensions select the final accepted hypothesis set?')
sendPrompt('Design the knowledge base (v7) — what schema and storage is needed for case data, regulations, and vector embeddings?')
